IsA: It is a narrative in the four canonical Gospels.
It is an event celebrated each year by Christians on Palm Sunday.
It is an episode that introduces the events of the Passion of Jesus.
It is an account narrated in Matthew 21:1–11, Mark 11:1–11, Luke 19:28–44 and John 12:12–19.
It is a story with discrepancies between the Gospels.

It has scholarly interpretations regarding Jesus' entry into Jerusalem.
It has a description of a crowd following Jesus.
